titleStmt.title: SII 11.119: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 119. (B.K. No. 186 of 1926-27.) NAREGAL, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB INSIDE THE TEMPLE OF KALAMĒŚVARA.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and places on record the gift of land made by Muṇḍeyara Śrī[va]nta-Gāvuṇḍa on the specified date to Nīlakaṇṭha Paṇḍitadēva, for the benefit of the temple of Mūlasthānadēva, built by him in the centre of the southern quarter of Narayaṁgal. At the time of recording the grant the Sinda Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Permāḍidēvarasa was ruling over Kisukāḍu Seventy, Keḷavāḍi Three-Hundred, Bāgaḍage Seventy and Narayaṁgal Twelve, from his capital at Erambarage. It is known from a record at Kōḍikop, a hamlet of Narēgal (B.K. No. 194 of 1926-27), that the chief was administering the same tract in A.D. 1144 under the Western Chālukya king Jagadēkamalla II (J.B.B.R.A.S., Vol. XI, pp. 253 ff.).

The charter is dated Śaka 872, Śaumya, Pushya, śu. puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse and Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The details are very irregular. In Saumya' according to the Southern Cycle, Pushya full-moon fell on Monday but the tithi ended at ·06. There was no lunar eclipse or Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti on this day. But in the previous year, i.e., Kīlaka, which was Saumya, according to the Northern Cycle Pushya-puṇṇami commenced at ·11 on Monday; but there was no eclipse on this day and the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti occurred only five days later. But on the following, i.e., Māgha-pūrṇimā, there was a lunar eclipse. Taking Saumya by the Northern Cycle, the week-day and tithi would yield the English date Monday, December 18, A.D. 948.
(Published in J.B.B.R.A.S., Vol. XI, pp. 224 ff.).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāyaḥ . nama stuṁ garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē
jayatyānanda nnasamasta bhuvanē śivaḥ . ©
© śrīrāmāramaṇīya sārava śrīnivāsavamaḷayaśōvistāraṁsamastabhuvanādhāraṁ caḷakya vaṁśavesadudu dhareyoḷu . kramadiṁdaṁ palabar
jagajjananuta rccāḷekyabhūpa rpparākramadiṁ pāḷisutaṁ baral dharaṇiyaṁ tadvaṁśajātaṁ nṛpōttamaratnaṁ jayasiṁha napratimatējaṁ tā
ḷdidaṁ prājyaṁ rājyama nātmīyacaritratīrtthajaḷadhautāśēṣadhātrītaḷaṁ . Ene negarḻda bhūpaniṁ tattaneyaṁ dhātrīśanāda nāhavakēḷīvinuta
bhujadarppavīrāvanivallabhanikaramalla nāhavamallaṁ . v® . Ā bhūvallabhaniṁde rājyanirataṁ tatsūnu sōmēśvaraṁ bhūbhārōddharaṇa
kṣamaṁ caturupāyōpēta paṁcāṁgamaṁtrābhidyōtitarājanītivinutaṁ tībrapratāpāvalēpābhīḷaṁ bhuvanaikamalla nesadaṁ prakhyātavīrōttamaṁ . Aṁtā
bhūpani navanīkāntāpatiyādanātananujaṁ ghanavikrāṁtaṁ tribhuvanamallaṁ kauṁtēyabhuja pratāpa napratirūpaṁ . taṁnājñe taṁna tējaṁ taṁnuṁnati nagaḷe rāya
riṁnuṁ muṁnaṁ taṁna doreyeniparilleṁbaṁnaṁ permmāḍirāya nesadaṁ jagadoḷ . © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭaraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . Ā cāḷukya kulakke bhaktarenisirddatyaṁta vikrāṁtalīlācāryyarkka
danaikadhuryya ravanīprastutyaśuddhaprasiddhācārerjjagadēkavīra rasadṛkṣakṣatrasaṁvēdya vidyācāturyya rudagradhairyya reseda rsiṁ
dānvayōrvvībhujaru . tadvaṁśaprabhavaṁ prabhūtavibhavaṁ nānākaḷākōvidaṁ vidviṣṭāvanipāḷajāḷavijayaprōccaṇḍadōrddaṇḍa nudya
dvīrāgraṇi maṇḍaḷēśatiḷakaṁ siṁdānvayakhyātisaṁpadvistāricaritra nācuginṛpaṁ prakhyātiyaṁ tāḷdidaṁ . Anupamaśauryyaṁ cāḷu
kyanarēṁdrana muṁde haṭṭigāḷegadoḷ paṁpanapapaṁ parapidaneṁdene subhaṭa rddoreye bagevaḍā cuginṛpanoḷ . Ene nega
rddācugibhūmipe nanujāta rnnākanṛpati siṁganṛpaṁ dāsanṛpaṁ dāvanṛpaṁ cauṇḍanṛpaṁ cāvanṛpa nene guṇōnnata resadar . Avaroḷa
ge rājyalakṣmīnivāsa nene negaḻda nakhiḷaripubhīkarasauṣṭhavabhujabaḷaṁ yaśaśrībhavanaṁ kadanapracaṇḍa cāvuṁḍanṛpaṁ . Enesi
dā bhūpaniṁdaṁ negaḻdanakhiḷarājyāṁganāvallabhaṁ tā nene dōrvvikrāṁtadiṁdācuginṛpatanayaṁ baṁmabhūpaṁ raṇābhīḷanṛpāḷō
ttaṁsa nurvvīdharavibhutanayādhīśvaraśrīpadābjāvanamadbhṛṁgaṁ guṇāṁbhōnidhi budhajanalabdhapraśaṁsāvataṁsaṁ . Ā nṛpatiyiṁde rājya
śrīnārīramaṇa nanisidaṁ guṇaniḷayaṁ bhūnutaśastrakaḷāvijñānaṁ maṇḍaḷikatiḷaka nācugi dēvaṁ . palavuṁ durggaṁgaḷaṁ koṇḍa
vinatanṛparaṁ tūḷdi beṁkoṁḍu darppāviḷaraṁ mārkkoṁ ḍarātikṣitipatigaḷa dēśaṁgaḷaṁ kūḍe kaikoṁḍu lasatpuṇyakriyāsaṁbhava vibha
vamanaṁtoccataṁgoṁḍu lakṣmīlalanākāntaṁ samaṁtācarasa nakhiḷasaukhyāspada khyātanādaṁ . caṁḍāṁśupratibhāsi poysaḷana nārddē
rvvaṭṭidaṁ gōveyaṁ koṁḍaṁ lakṣmana nājiyoḷ tavisidaṁ vikrāṁtadiṁ deydi beṁkoṁḍaṁ pāṁḍyananāvagaṁ malavaraṁ tūḷdaṭṭidaṁ koṁkaṇaṁ goṁ
ḍaṁ vikramacakravartti besasalu saṁgrāmakaṇṭhīravaṁ . va . Iṁtu dharmmanirmmāṇatatparanenisida mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ācarasana ma
hāsati . paramapatibrate nirmmaḷacarite mahāpuṇyasati mahādēvi jagadvaramaṇḍaḷēśa rājñīśirōvibhūṣaṇavenalke jasa
maṁ taḷedaḷ . Enisida mādēviga vājananuta nṛpatiḷaka(ṁ) nanisidācarasaṁgaṁ janiyisidaṁ sakaḷajagajjanaharṣaṁ janiyisalke permmā
ḍinṛpaṁ . jitavīradviṭpuraṁ nirjjitasamadamahīnāthayūthaṁ bhujōpārjjitanānāmaṇḍaḷaṁ tarjjitaripunṛpatībrapratāpōda
yaṁ varjjitakāḷē prabhāvaprabhavakaluṣanasphūrjjitārāti lōkōrjjitacāritraṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷikatimiracaṁḍāṁ
śu permmāḍidēvaṁ [.] permmāḍibhūpaṁgena sucicaritasnānadēvārccanā hōmamahādānabrataugha dvija??ru
munipūjādipuṇyakriyāprakramadiṁ dharmmārtthaśāstraśrutiyi nakhiḷadivyāṁnadānaṁgaḷiṁ duttamanānānavyakāvyaśravaṇa
sarasagōṣṭhīviḷāsaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ . sale saphaḷa venisi divasaṁ saluttamire sadvinōdadi rājyaśrīlalaneyoḍagūḍi sukhadiṁ
naliyutirppa salīla nabhinavabhōjaṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara . Udāravīralakṣmīśvara . sindaku
ḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa . maṁḍaḷikakusumakōdaṁḍa . sūkaḷahayārūḍaprauḍaśikṣāvicakṣaṇaṁ . paripūrṇnasubhala
kṣaṇa . kavigamakavādivāgmijanasaṁstūyamāna . guṇagaṇanidhāna . śivāgamasamākarṇnanakarṇnapūra . sakaḷavidvajjanādhā
ra . Apāraparahitācāryya . Asahāyasauryya . nānānayōpāyanipuṇacāṇakya . Acaḷitavākya . śastraśā
strādisatkaḷāpapravīṇa . raṇāṁgaṇadhurīṇa [.] bhōgōpabhōgasaṁkraṁdana . Anūnadānaravinaṁdana . Anēkavidhadurggavarggatri
ṇētra . Ādirājacaritra . śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara . maṁḍaḷikadikkuṁjara . kāvyagītarasānubhavavinōda . śrīmūlasthānadēva
labdhavaraprasādādināmāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ permmāḍidēvarasar kisukāḍeppattuṁ keḷavāḍimū
nūṟuṁ bāgaḍage Erppattu narayaṁgalu panneraḍu miṁtinitaṟubhayasāmyamaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanayiṁ deraṁ
barageya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamirddu purātanamappa dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ pratipāḷisu
tta dharmmaprasaṁgamādalli dharmmaṁgaḷgella sāsanamāgalvērkkumeṁdu kāruṇyaṁ geyyal . kaṁ . jaḷanidhiparivṛtavasudhātaḷa
doḷ bharatōrvvigesava kuntaḷadēśaṁ tiḷakamenisirddu dadaṟoḷ phaḷabharitaṁ narayagalu karaṁ raṁjisuguṁ . vṛtta .
Adu nānādivyagandha prasarakusumavāṭaṁgaḷiṁ sārasaukhyaprada śītāṁbhastaṭākaṁgaḷi natibahaḷārāmaṣaṁḍaṁgaḷiṁ vyāptadi
gaṁcadgandhaśāḷi prabhṛti sarasasasyaṁgaḷiṁ celvuvetirppudu pānthabrātacētōhara vakhiḷa jagadbhavya vatyaṁtasēvyaṁ . va .
Aṁtoppuva narayaṁgalleraḍuṁ baḷadoḷagaṇyapuṇyamuditōditamappa puṇyapurṣariṁda dharmmapratipā
ḷanāpararappa prabhugāvuṁḍugaḷiṁda vesedu malli teṁkaṇabhāgadūra naḍuvaṇa śrīmūlasthāna dēvara dēgulamaṁ māḍi
si dēvaraṁgabhōgakke sakavarṣa 872 ḍeneya saumya saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha puṇyami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇamuttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāntiyaṁdu muṁḍeyara śrīvantagāvuṁḍaṁ nīlakaṇṭhapaṇḍitadēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi pāramēśvaradatti sarvvanamaśyavāgi
biṭṭa bhūmiya sthaḷa muduvoḷala dāriyiṁ baḍaga navayavaḷadiṁ teṁka vāsigāvuṁḍana baḷadiṁ mūḍa karabhūmiyiṁ paḍuva
sarvvamānyemu . sarvvarbhbādhaparihāremumāgi yācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍavaṁtāgi biṭṭa mattaru mūvattāṟakke liṁgamuṁ tapōdhana
ruṁ kavileyuṁ berasu māḍi niṟisida kiṁnarigalla guḍḍe nālku . muduvoḷala dhāriyiṁ teṁka bannirabammagāvuṇḍana baḷadiṁ
baḍaga karabhūmiyiṁ mūḍa kāṭigāṁvuṇḍana baḷadiṁ paḍuva sarvvanamasya moge mattarāṟakaṁ liṁgamuṁ tapōdhanaruṁ kavileyuṁ
berasu māḍi niṟisida kinnarigalla guḍḍenālku . tippēśvaradēvara keyyi kuyyavaḷadiṁ paḍuva ciguravaḷadiṁ mūḍa karabhūmiyiṁ
bhaḍaga mattaṁ karabhūmiyiṁ teṁka sarvvanamasyada mattarāṟakkaṁ nālku gōṁṭiṁgaṁ liṁgamuṁ tapōdhanaruṁ kavileyuṁ bera
su māḍi niṟisida kinnarigalla guḍḍe nālku [.] dēvara tōṁṭada sthaḷa navayarakēta gāvuṇḍana mogeyiṁ mūḍa cavuṇḍameyadaṇḍanāyakana
mogeyiṁ paḍuva karabhūmiyiṁ baḍaga beḷgeṟeya baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka sarvvamānyada tōṁṭa mattaroṁdakkaṁ nālku gōṁṭiṁgaṁ liṁgamuṁ
tapōdhanaruṁ kavileyuṁ berasu māḍi niṟisida kinna rigallaguḍḍe nālku . dēvara nivēṣaṇaṁ cuṁgīśvaradiṁ baḍaga rājavīthiyiṁ teṁka śrī
vāgiliṁ paḍuva mattaṁ rājavīthiyiṁ mūḍa vintīsthaḷedoḷage naḍeva Aṣṭabhōgasvāmya māge dēvara nandādīvigege sarvvanamasya
vāgi biṭṭa gāṇa mūlasthāna kelidēvasvāmige Aṟuvatokkaluṁ gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ mukhyavāgi mā
dēvara paṭṭakke koṭṭa gadyāṇavoṁdu
Digital edition of SII 11.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
